title: 4x4 off-road driving tour program
route: border gate.El Oued Alg. Tozeur Tns
inclusions: AccommodationIn. a desert camp. Or in a hotel
Entry and exit procedures at the border gate are the responsibility of our guide.
Pay the entrance fee to the national park

itinerary.itineraryDays:
Entry via the Hazoua border crossing, Tunisia, Algeria.

👋 After a warm welcome, our guide will handle check-in procedures at the border gate.

➡️ Then we'll head to a hotel in El Oued,

📍 approximately 100 kilometers away.

We travel to:
➡️ Touggourt
➡️ then Hassi Messaoud
🌙 and spend the night at the TFT Hotel
📍 Total distance covered: 620 km

In the morning, we leave TFT
🛣️ and pass through Ain Amenas,
🏨 and spend the night at the Hadj Salah Bouamama Hotel in Illizi,
📍 about 610 km away

🏔️ We begin our exploration of the Tassili N'Ajjer Mountains,
📍 starting from the village of Bordj El Haouas.

🏜️ Then we enter the Erg Admer dunes
⛺ and camp there. Distance covered: about 350 km

🏜️ We will embark on a deeper adventure in the towering and rugged Erg Admer dunes,
🧭 dedicating the entire day to exploration.

 🌙 Then we will spend the night in the Tighirt Valley.

The distance covered is approximately 120 km.

🌅 In the morning, we will enter the town of Djanet.
⛽ to refuel.
📄 and complete some administrative procedures.
➡️ Before heading to the Tadrart Desert.

🌙 We will spend the night in the Burj Valley in Tadrart.

The distance covered is approximately 200 km.

🌅 In the morning, we will explore the Camel Village,
🏛️ then the arches of the cathedral,
🎨 and the rock paintings and engravings in the Izwaten Valley.

 🌙 We will spend the night among the towering red sand dunes of Tin Merzouga.

Distance covered: approximately 90 km

🪨 We will explore the rock paintings and engravings
🏛️ and the massive arches in the In Jaran Valley,
🌙 and spend the night among the dunes of Ighlatine.

Distance covered: approximately 120 km
⸻

We will enter Djanet
⛽ to refuel
🛍️ and visit the traditional market selling handicrafts and Tuareg clothing
➡️ Then we will head to the Ténéré Hotel for the night.
Distance covered: approximately 200 km

🏞️ We will explore the Timghas Gorge
⛰️ and the mountains
🕳️ and the caves of Tikoubaouine,
🌙 and spend the night in Erg Issendelen.
Distance covered: approximately 90 km

We head towards the Dider Valley,
🌴 then explore the Iherir Oasis
🏨 and spend the night at the Illizi Hotel
The distance covered is approximately 420 km

In the morning, we leave Illizi, cross Ain Amenas
🌙 and spend the night in the TFT neighborhood

We head towards Hassi Messaoud. We cross Touggourt
🌙 and spend the night at the El Oued Hotel

In the morning, we head towards the Taleb Larbi border crossing
📝 Upon arrival, our guide will handle the exit procedures

description:
A desert adventure with us. To be experienced, not just described.

Note: The price is subject to increase or decrease depending on the number of people and the number of days.
